---
title: "Practical mapping examples with MAFF data"

output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Practical mapping examples with MAFF data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Mapping MAFF data

Read data from the MAFF database [地域の農業を見て・知って・活かすDB](https://www.maff.go.jp/j/tokei/census/shuraku_data/){target="_blank"}.

```{r ehime1, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
library(fude)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)

d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE)

b1 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 1, quiet = TRUE)
b2 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 2, quiet = TRUE)
b3 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 3, quiet = TRUE)

m1 <- read_ikasudb(b1, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")
m2 <- read_ikasudb(b2, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")
m3 <- read_ikasudb(b3, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")

m1$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m1$地域類型1次分類, levels = sort(unique(na.omit(m1$地域類型1次分類))))
m2$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m2$地域類型1次分類, levels = sort(unique(na.omit(m2$地域類型1次分類))))
m3$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m3$地域類型1次分類, levels = sort(unique(na.omit(m3$地域類型1次分類))))

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b1)$ja`

```{r ehime2, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m2, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b2)$ja`

```{r ehime3, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m3, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b3)$ja`

```{r ehime4, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
m1 <- read_ikasudb(b1, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")
m2 <- read_ikasudb(b2, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")
m3 <- read_ikasudb(b3, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low  = "white",
    high = "darkorange",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b1)$ja`

```{r ehime5, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m2, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low  = "white",
    high = "darkorange",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b2)$ja`

```{r ehime6, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = m3, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low  = "white",
    high = "darkorange",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))
```

**出典**: `r cite_fude(b3)$ja`

```{r toon, eval = FALSE}
m1 <- b1 |>
  read_ikasudb("~/GC0001_2019_2020_38.xlsx")

library(mapview)

mapview(m1, zcol = "組織数")

t1 <- extract_boundary(m1, city = "東温")

mapview(t1, zcol = "組織数")
```

```{r all_cols, dpi = 150, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.show = "asis"}
m1 <- b1 |>
  read_ikasudb("~/GC0001_2019_2020_38.xlsx")

for (i in setdiff(names(m1), names(b1[[1]]))) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = .data[[i]]), color = "grey60") +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low  = "white",
      high = "darkblue",
      na.value = "grey90"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

  print(p)
  # ggsave(paste0(i, ".png"), p)
}
```
